title: Environment Studies
tagline: A collection of Environment Studies. Experimenting with Lighting, Camera, Post-Processing, Shaders, etc.

title: NEON OVERDRIVE
tagline: Anti-Gravity Racing Game // Environment, Gameplay Design, Art Direction, Level Design, UI // 2024
description: Neon Overdrive is a high octane, anti-gravity racing game that takes place in the near-future cyberpunk city of Cloud Medina. This game premiered in an exhibition in the German University in Cairo. Original Soundtrack by Ahmed Fouad (MoozMusic)

title: Risky Fishing
tagline: Fishing collector game with an exciting twist. // Environment, Assets, Gameplay Design, UI, Art Direction, Sound Direction,

title: Blown to Bits
tagline: Retro-Style movement survival shooter. // Environment, Gameplay Design, Art Direction, Assets, UI, Level Design, Sound Design
description: One-week project, featuring modernised retro elements. Stylised cell shaded thriller environment, mixing 3D and 2D pixel art assets creatively.

title: PuppyCat's Quest
tagline: Speedrun Platforming Game // Environment, Animation, Gameplay Design, Assets, Illustration, UI, Development, Level Design // 2023
description: PuppyCat's Quest is a solo game which was inspired by a Netflix original: Bee and PuppyCat. You control PuppyCat and make it through a peaceful environment in this speed-run platformer. This game premiered in an exhibition at the German University in Cairo.

title: Combat Sim VR
tagline: Virtual Reality Combat Training // Environment, Assets, Gameplay Design, Physics, Development, Level Design, Oculus // 2023
description: Combat Sim VR is a solo project that features fully functional VR integration, physics, and environment. The objective of this project was to experiment with an educational martial arts training environment in VR. Including video game and gamification elements to create a more fun and enjoyable, yet informative experience.

title: Interactive, Immersive, Evolving AI Environment
tagline: In-Game AI Characters interact with you based on your behaviour and their surroundings. They treat you differently based on their unique personalities and how much they like/trust you.

title: Jimmy's Office
tagline: Puzzle Platformer // Environment, Gameplay Design, Level Design, Assets
